The market is projected to grow from USD 13.58 billion in 2025 to USD 36.78 billion by 2032, exhibiting a CAGR of 15.3% during the forecast period. IT Service Management (ITSM) refers to organizations' activities, processes, and strategies to design, deliver, manage, and improve IT services they provide to their customers or end-users. This service focuses on aligning IT services with the needs of the business and ensuring that the IT infrastructure and services support its goals and objectives.
